summary: The diff implements most requirements well. REQ-1 through REQ-6 are fully addressed in the frontend with a dark neon theme, navigation, proxy section, games grid, shows grid, and hero section. REQ-7 is partially implemented: the backend has query functions and records, but the records are missing the required 'id' field, and there are only 2 games and 2 shows stored. Additionally, the backend uses 'example.com' placeholder embed/thumbnail URLs rather than publicly accessible sources.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each record includes at minimum: id, title, description, embedUrl, thumbnailUrl
missing_requirements.reason: The Game and Show types in backend/main.mo do not include an 'id' field. Only title, description, embedUrl, and thumbnailUrl are defined.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store a static list of games and shows in the backend as stable data records with publicly accessible embed URLs
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only stores 2 games and 2 shows, and all embed/thumbnail URLs are 'example.com' placeholders rather than publicly accessible sources. The frontend compensates with fallback data, but the backend itself does not fulfill the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity / authentication infrastructure (InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, AuthClient integration)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not implement user authentication or login walls' and lists user accounts as a non-goal, yet a full Internet Identity auth system is wired into the app.

hallucinated_features.description: Refresh and Clear buttons in the Proxy section beyond the specified Go button
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only specifies a URL input field and a Go button. Refresh and Clear controls were added beyond the specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component with caffeine.ai attribution and UTM tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer was requested in the build specification.
